description_long: This research institute is a large, uniquely shaped building with a design reminiscent of a spacecraft, set within a rectangular, landscaped plot. The structure features a flat, segmented roof with several circular and rectangular elements, and is surrounded by a perimeter fence. The grounds are lush with numerous trees, manicured lawns, and several outdoor seating and pavilion areas, providing ample green space for relaxation or gatherings. The building itself appears to be constructed from concrete or similar materials, with a prominent main entrance and multiple geometric facets. The site includes pathways and open areas, suggesting accessibility and integration with the surrounding environment. The overall appearance is modern and distinctive, with a focus on both functionality and aesthetic landscaping.
description: A large, modern research institute with a unique, geometric design, surrounded by landscaped grounds, trees, and outdoor seating areas.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the building, landscaped lawns, trees, and several outdoor pavilions on the right.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the main entrance, symmetrical landscaping, and outdoor seating areas directly in front of the building.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the building's geometric roof and additional green space with pavilions and trees.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back entrance, a row of trees, and the open green area behind the building.
attribute_entryway_design: The main entryway is centrally located at the front, featuring a wide, flat approach with a geometric, angular canopy. The entrance is accessible via a short, level pathway, and appears to have double doors, likely made of glass or metal, with no visible steps, suggesting wheelchair accessibility. The area is flanked by landscaping and decorative trees.
